# PregnancyPal Documentation

> User documentation for PregnancyPal — a maternal wellness companion app with
> week-by-week pregnancy tracking, kick counter, contractions timer, meal
> planning, appointment management, period & fertility tracking, community by
> week-cohort, wellness reminders, and a health-report PDF export.
> Available as a web app and an Android app (on Google Play); iPhone/iPad users
> use the web app in Safari. A companion Chrome extension is also available.
> Built by Ahsan Mahmood.

## Key links

- App: https://pregnancypal.aoneahsan.com
- Android (Google Play): https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.aoneahsan.pregnancypal
- Docs site: https://pregnancypal-docs.aoneahsan.com
- Sitemap: https://pregnancypal-docs.aoneahsan.com/sitemap.xml
- Author: https://aoneahsan.com (Ahsan Mahmood)

## Getting started

- /docs/intro — Welcome and overview
- /docs/getting-started/installation — Open the app on the web or Android
- /docs/getting-started/sign-up — Create your account (sign in with Google)
- /docs/getting-started/onboarding — First-run setup (LMP, conditions, diet)
- /docs/getting-started/dashboard-tour — Find your way around after signing in

## Feature documentation

- /docs/features/pregnancy-tracking/week-by-week — Week-by-week tracking, milestones, baby development, maternal changes
- /docs/features/tools/kick-counter — Kick counter and /docs/features/tools/contractions-timer — contractions timer
- /docs/features/tracking/blood-pressure — Vitals & symptom logging (blood pressure, glucose, temperature, weight, symptoms)
- /docs/features/wellness/water-intake — Wellness modules (water, medications, eye breaks, posture, movement, exercise, mood)
- /docs/features/diet/meal-planning — Diet & nutrition (meal planning, dietary restrictions, nutrition targets, condition-aware plans)
- /docs/features/appointments/scheduling — Appointment scheduling, reminders, and PDF export
- /docs/features/period/cycle-tracking — Period, ovulation estimates, fertility, and pre-pregnancy use
- /docs/features/community/joining-cohorts — Week-cohort communities, posting, safety & moderation
- /docs/features/notifications/push — Push notifications, preferences, quiet hours
- /docs/features/reporting/health-export-pdf — Health-report PDF export
- /docs/features/account/profile — Account, security, data export, account deletion
- /docs/features/settings/theme-customizer — Theme customizer, units, language
- /docs/features/mobile/install-android — Mobile install, offline behavior, deep linking, share & PDF
- /docs/features/extension/install — Chrome companion extension
- /docs/help/faq — FAQ, troubleshooting, contact support
- /docs/legal/privacy — Plain-language privacy, terms, and data-handling summaries
- /docs/about/glossary — Pregnancy & app glossary

## About

- /docs/about/credits — About PregnancyPal, author attribution, and how to support

## Honest framing

PregnancyPal is a tracking and organization companion. It is NOT a substitute
for prenatal care, does NOT diagnose any condition, and does NOT replace
healthcare provider guidance. Predictions (such as ovulation estimates) are
estimates, not medical advice. Always consult a qualified provider for medical
decisions.
